# Ibuprofen 相關新聞

[← 返回新聞總覽]({{ '/news/' | relative_url }})

---

<p class="key-answer" data-question="Ibuprofen 有什麼相關新聞？">
<strong>Ibuprofen</strong> 目前有 <strong>4 則</strong>相關新聞報導，預測適應症 20 個。
</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Ibuprofen 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Treatment of a haemodynamically significant patent ductus arteriosus in preterm newborn infants less than 34 weeks of gestational age.</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>osteoarthritis susceptibility（99.9%）</li>
<li>osteoarthritis（99.8%）</li>
<li>rheumatoid arthritis（99.8%）</li>
<li>acromesomelic dysplasia, Hunter-Thompson type（99.7%）</li>
<li>brachyolmia-amelogenesis imperfecta syndrome（99.7%）</li>
<li>myosclerosis（99.7%）</li>
<li>brachyolmia（99.7%）</li>
<li>brachydactyly-syndactyly syndrome（99.7%）</li>
<li>pseudoachondroplasia（99.7%）</li>
<li>colobomatous microphthalmia-rhizomelic dysplasia syndrome（99.6%）</li>
<li>arthropathy（99.5%）</li>
<li>hypotrichosis simplex of the scalp（98.6%）</li>
<li>WHIM syndrome（98.4%）</li>
<li>congenital hypotrichosis milia（98.3%）</li>
<li>diffuse alopecia areata（98.2%）</li>
<li>rheumatoid nodulosis（96.8%）</li>
<li>rheumatoid factor-positive polyarticular juvenile idiopathic arthritis（96.5%）</li>
<li>juvenile idiopathic arthritis（96.4%）</li>
<li>juvenile arthritis due to defect in LACC1（96.3%）</li>
<li>combined immunodeficiency due to moesin deficiency（96.3%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
<p><a href="{{ '/drugs/ibuprofen/' | relative_url }}">查看完整藥物報告 →</a></p>
</div>
